title: FOOD BANK - 211info
text: VERNONIA CARES FOOD BANK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Shopping style food pantry provides three days worth of emergency groceries also provides bread weekly and pet food. 547 Weed Avenue Vernonia, OR 97064 Eligibility: USDA income guidelines Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 10am-2pm Email (503) 429-1414 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 429-1414 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of address LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Columbia County and zip code 97133 (Washington County only) SITE HOURS: Tuesday/Thursday 10am-2pm Services: Food Pantries Pet Food If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. VERNONIA CARES
